caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white jacket. In the background, clothing racks and office chairs are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man gestures with his hands while speaking, occasionally touching his face or moving his arm. To the left of the screen, a circular logo contains the text "THE" and "STUDIO," while a red logo on the right says "BOOSTY FILE TOT." The scene remains stationary, with the only movement being the man's shifting facial expressions and hand gestures as he continues his conversation.
